summary: The diff modifies backend/main.mo and frontend/src/components/AddUserModal.tsx (plus metadata files). The frontend AddUserModal change clearly removes the permission error banner and presents a clean form with Name, Email ID, Role fields and Cancel/Add Member buttons, satisfying REQ-2. However, the backend/main.mo diff is truncated and does not show the actual addTeamMember function body — it is unclear whether the admin/role-based permission check was removed from that function, which is the core of REQ-1.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove the permission check that blocks non-admin users from adding team members in the backend. The addTeamMember function should allow any authenticated caller to add a team member without role-based restriction.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and does not show the addTeamMember function body. There is no visible evidence that the admin permission check was removed from that function. The truncation prevents confirmation that this requirement was implemented.
